question: Analyzing the area chart of revenue from 2018 to 2022, which statement is best supported by the data shown?

options.A: The highest revenue is clearly higher in 2022 than in any previous year.
options.B: The revenues in 2021 and 2022 appear to be about the same.
options.C: Revenue decreased every year from 2018 to 2020.
options.D: Revenue was lowest in 2020 among all the years shown.

explanation: The bar tops are clipped outside the visible plotting area, so equality or ordering for the clipped bars cannot be inferred.
